title: rubus × argutifolius var. tomentellus
intro: Rubus × argutifolius var. tomentellus, commonly known as a variant of the hybrid blackberry or hybrid raspberry, is a type of thorny shrub native to parts of Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Rubus × argutifolius var. tomentellus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive functions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, as well as consumed fresh in salads or as a fruit supplement.
